system.description:
Prowls in total silence (begin as a movement action; Judge rolls in secret — the thief always believes he succeeded). Sneak at exploration speed or 1/2 combat speed freely; -5 above that; -10 running. Success = literally no noise, even for successful Listeners; engaging an unengaged opponent from the rear denies its free facing change. Opponents suffer -2 to surprise while the thief is out of sight.

Auto-scales with the owner's class level in party rolls (RR p. 31): L1: 17+ · L2: 16+ · L3: 15+ · L4: 14+ · L5: 13+ · L6: 12+ · L7: 10+ · L8: 8+ · L9: 6+ · L10: 4+ · L11: 2+ · L12: 0+ · L13: -2+ · L14: -4+. For a class using the skill at half level, set the module's levelFactor flag to 0.5.
